summary: Round 4 reopens HNSW around layer0_searcher_parity as the next explicit authority-backed hypothesis. Round 3 earned a soft-stop rather than a verdict refresh: Rust same-schema HNSW improved to 553.060494112464 qps at recall 0.9942999999999994, but the historical family classification remains functional-but-not-leading because native also rose to 10792.646 qps and kept the gap near 19.5x.
action: Use this artifact as the round 4 baseline. The next step is to audit the native layer-0 searcher shape against the Rust BinaryHeap-based search core, then rerun the same-schema authority lane only after a targeted layer0 L2 parity rework lands.
